content: Build smart Najiz parsing engine (space-insensitive, cut-at-next-label, junk stripping, de-glue)
Fix case matching (glued case numbers) + apply parser to cases cards/details, smaller luxe cards
Apply parser to powers of attorney cards + details modal
Apply parser to executions cards + details
Apply RLS migration: employee assigned_cases/clients actually grant data access
Employee portal: render permitted sections/cases/clients, fix template (link, access code persistence)
Client portal: reliable welcome template after save/update, perf fixes
Seed test accounts (lawyer/employee/client) + blob test data, write test_credentials.md
End-to-end testing via testing agent (cards parsing + employee portal permissions + templates)
